header.title: Reaction Time Test
header.name: Reaction Time Test
header.subtitle: What percentile is your neural reaction speed?

intro.title: Reaction Time Test
intro.description: Tap as quickly as possible when the screen turns green!
intro.step1: Wait for the red background that says 'Wait...'
intro.step2: Tap immediately when the screen turns green and shows 'Go!'
intro.step3: Your reaction time will be measured in milliseconds
intro.step4: After 5 measurements, check your average and grade

results.title: Test Complete!
results.shareText: My average reaction time is {avgTime}ms ({gradeName})! What's yours?

premium.improvementSuggestion: Adequate sleep, rest, and stress relief through meditation or exercise can help improve reaction time.

superhuman.description: You have a reaction speed far exceeding the average. This suggests outstanding neural transmission speed and immediate decision-making ability.

veryFast.description: Your reaction speed is much faster than average. You likely have high neural efficiency and good concentration.
veryFast.traits: High concentration,Fast learning ability,Good reflexes,Excellent adaptability

fast.description: You have a faster reaction speed than average. This indicates a healthy nervous system and good attentiveness.

normal.description: Your reaction speed is within the normal range. This indicates normal nervous system function and adequate concentration.

slow.description: Your reaction speed is slower than average. This may be caused by fatigue, stress, or distraction.
slow.improvement: Adequate sleep and rest, and stress relief through meditation or exercise can help improve reaction speed.

result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of participants have your reaction speed
